mapper.sql: run_id, session_id, root_session_id, parent_session_id, child_session, discovery_source, task_message_id, task_part_id, task_call_id, trace_id, metadata_json, discovered_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: merge into run_session_scopes as target using (values ( #{row.runId}, #{row.rootSessionId}, #{row.scopeVersion}, #{row.traceId}, #{row.metadataJson}, #{row.createdAt}, #{row.updatedAt} )) as source(run_id, root_session_id, scope_version, trace_id, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) on target.run_id = source.run_id when matched then update set root_session_id = source.root_session_id, scope_version = source.scope_version, trace_id = source.trace_id, metadata_json = source.metadata_json, updated_at = source.updated_at when not matched then insert ( run_id, root_session_id, scope_version, trace_id, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( source.run_id, source.root_session_id, source.scope_version, source.trace_id, source.metadata_json, source.created_at, source.updated_at )

merge into run_session_scope_sessions as target using (values ( #{row.runId}, #{row.sessionId}, #{row.rootSessionId}, #{row.parentSessionId}, #{row.childSession}, #{row.discoverySource}, #{row.taskMessageId}, #{row.taskPartId}, #{row.taskCallId}, #{row.traceId}, #{row.metadataJson}, #{row.discoveredAt}, #{row.updatedAt} )) as source( run_id, session_id, root_session_id, parent_session_id, child_session, discovery_source, task_message_id, task_part_id, task_call_id, trace_id, metadata_json, discovered_at, updated_at ) on target.run_id = source.run_id and target.session_id = source.session_id when matched then update set root_session_id = source.root_session_id, parent_session_id = source.parent_session_id, child_session = source.child_session, discovery_source = source.discovery_source, task_message_id = source.task_message_id, task_part_id = source.task_part_id, task_call_id = source.task_call_id, trace_id = source.trace_id, metadata_json = source.metadata_json, updated_at = source.updated_at when not matched then insert ( run_id, session_id, root_session_id, parent_session_id, child_session, discovery_source, task_message_id, task_part_id, task_call_id, trace_id, metadata_json, discovered_at, updated_at ) values ( source.run_id, source.session_id, source.root_session_id, source.parent_session_id, source.child_session, source.discovery_source, source.task_message_id, source.task_part_id, source.task_call_id, source.trace_id, source.metadata_json, source.discovered_at, source.updated_at )
mapper.select:
select
from run_session_scope_sessions where run_id = #{runId} order by discovered_at, session_id

select
from run_session_scope_sessions where root_session_id = #{rootSessionId} order by child_session, discovered_at, session_id
